name: Atlas Prime
description: In bygone ages, mountains were said to house warriors. In this age, the mountain has become the warrior.
passiveDescription: Becomes immune to Knockdown effects while on the ground.

abilities.name: Landslide
abilities.description: Bash enemies with an explosive sliding punch, repeat up to three times for a combo attack. Each hit in the three-punch combo increases the radius of the attack. Energy cost is reduced with each hit of Landslide. Install mods on the Landslide Fists to boost stats.

abilities.name: Tectonics
abilities.description: Summon a Bulwark rock-wall, activate again to send the rocks crashing toward the enemy. Bulwarks attacked by enemies release an area-of-effect Slash powered by the Health it has lost.

abilities.name: Petrify
abilities.description: Atlas' hardened gaze will fossilize foes increasing the damage they take, heal Rumblers, and create Petrified Bulwarks. When shattered, petrified enemies drop healing Rubble for Atlas.

abilities.name: Rumblers
abilities.description: Summon two elemental stone brawlers to the melee. Summoning petrifies enemies in close proximity to Atlas. When finished, Rumblers collapse into a pile of healing Rubble.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: In bygone ages, mountains were said to house warriors. In this age, the mountain has become the warrior.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Atlas Prime Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Atlas Prime Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Atlas Prime Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Disabled Atlas’ Rumblers having Petrify AOE in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted more offsets for the Shard Bane Ephemera on Nidus, Gendel, Chroma, Lavos, Frost, Hildryn, Atlas, Rhino, Ash, and Vauban.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Landslide ability triggering Archon Mod effects.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Archons now prioritize players instead of summons (eg: Octavia's roller, Titania's Razorflies, Atlas Rumblers, etc) to prevent too egregious aggro CC.
patchlogs.fixes: Atlas

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Atlas Blueprint
Atlas’ Landslide
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Zenurik’s Inner Might causing Atlas’ Rubble Heap Augment Mod to cost Energy even when you have over 1400 rubble. 
Fixed Atlas being able to self-damage and destroy objectives with Tectonics.
Fixed rare issue with Atlas’ Tectonics Ability.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas Rubble not being created if you’ve replaced Petrify with a Helminth ability. 
Fixed Atlas’ Path of Statues Augment not working if you’ve replaced Petrify with a Helminth ability. 
Fixed Atlas’ Ore Gaze Augment always applying at 20% even if you don’t have the Mod equipped. 
Atlas Prime Noggle 
Fixed the Rubble Heap Augment mod not granting free casts of Atlas’ Landslide if Inner Might was equipped.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed not being able to jump as Atlas after Rumblers with the Titanic Rumbler Augment equipped expired while you are Operator.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Restored these to match Khora’s Pilfering Strangledome and Atlas’ Ore Gaze Augment mods intentionally not applying their loot bonuses on Void Manifestations.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect color customization on Atlas’ Tectonic walls. It will now use your emissives and accent colors.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed script error related to Atlas’ Rumblers. 
Fixed Atlas’ Titanic Rumbler Augment Mod not multiplying the Rumbler damage by 400% as described.

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Also fixed this for Melee abilities (Atlas’ Landslide for example) that were not inheriting from Kuva/Tenet Melee weapons. 
Fixed an error that caused Atlas Rumblers to use incorrect values for their punch damage which was disregarding your Power Strength bonus (and the Titanic Rumbler bonus if you had it equipped)
Fixed script error related to Atlas’ Rumblers.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.4
patchlogs.changes: Replaced the Perrin Sequence Sacrifice of Atlas Prime Chassis (recently Vaulted) with the Ivara Prime Systems. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1280406-perrin-sequence-syndicate-still-requires-atlas-prime-chassis-sacrifice-to-rank-up-to-partner-despite-vaulting/

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.changes:
Atlas Prime
Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Atlas Prime Systems with Titania Prime Helmet.
Replaced Cephalon Suda Sacrifice of Atlas Prime Chassis with Inaros Prime Chassis.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes: Atlas: 200% Primary Critical Chance and +1000 Armor
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed some of Atlas Karst and Nidus Phryke materials.
Fixed the Paradiso and Sigma Series Chest and Shoulder Plates floating away from Atlas Prime with the Blade of the Lotus skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Replaced Perrin Sequence Sacrifice of Wukong Prime Chassis with Atlas Prime Chassis.
Also added a dual wield custom HUD offset handling for Atlas, Gara, and Saryn.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: TennoGen: Update 30.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Atlas Blade of the Lotus Skin by BeastBuster

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed misaligned Kuva Lich Chest Armor on Atlas Prime and Atlas Karst.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Atlas’ Tectonic.

patchlogs.name: Octavia Prime: Hotfix 29.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Neuroptics with Atlas Prime Systems

patchlogs.name: Octavia Prime: Update 29.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Arbiters of Hexis Sacrifice of Equinox Prime Neuroptics with Atlas Prime Systems

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.7
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Bonewidow Melee attacking while using Shield Maiden (Maiden’s Kiss attack) would show Atlas' Landslide ability pop-up text.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
Gave Atlas a little more height on his backflip in his animation idles.You’d think he wouldn’t need it because he has no neck, but it needed to be done.
Overall, we still intend to look more at Atlas’s Tectonics, but due to some AI complications and ‘gotchas’, we had to reset a timeline to revisit this with a future batch of abilities. For now, those who saw a slight utility boost in the AOE Damage / Stagger we added to Tectonics’ Bulwarks will benefit from what was observed on the Public Test Cluster.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Rumblers no longer Petrifying enemies in radius when casting Rumblers if you replace the Petrify ability via Subsumed ability.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Atlas’ Petrify ability.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Update 28.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Atlas Landslide

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.6 + 28.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas ‘Rubble Heap’ Augment for Client players insisting that you needed energy to cast Landslide even though it was free.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mods that give base Damage (e.g. Pressure Point) not applying to Atlas’ Landslide.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas and Zephyr not playing their full body animation when equipping an Arch-Gun.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed performing a Mercy kill while Atlas’ Rumbled Augment is active giving you back your regular weapon during Rumbled.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Hotfix 27.4.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Atlas Rumbled Augment Damage absorption not blocking all Damage to Shields/Health and Pressure Point style Damage Mods not affecting Damage.
Fixed a script error when casting Atlas’ Petrify ability.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.11
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas’ Passive preventing Atlas from having any collision in Jordas Golem fight. 
Fixed an error that would occur when the game was determining attack logic for Atlas Rumblers.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.10
patchlogs.changes:
Replaced the Atlas Prime Helmet Blueprint with the Atlas Prime Systems blueprint in the Lith N4 Relic that was recently indeed to the mix. 
The Atlas Prime Helmet Blueprint was accidentally put into the Uncommon slot, when it is indeed a Rare piece.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sentient Battalyst laser party ability not respecting physical Shield abilities, such as Frost’s Snowglobe and Atlas’ Tectonics, and instead going through the barriers to injure players.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.9
patchlogs.fixes: Prevented frozen in time (Atlas Petrify, Limbo Stasis etc) enemies from being affected by Titania’s Lantern. The Energy spent to cast will be refunded if the cast fails.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Atlas’ Immovable Passive now also applies to Staggers.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas, Frost, Valkyr, Nidus, and Oberon's left arm bending in an unsettling way when holding the Opticor with their Noble Animation Sets equipped.
Fixed Atlas being unaffected by Vauban's Vector Pads. Rocks gotta go fast too.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: Tekko Prime now gains additional Status Chance when used with Atlas and/or Atlas Prime.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a case of Atlas’ Rumblers not being destroyed upon spamming the Ability.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.2:

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.1 + 25.8.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
Atlas Prime: Hotfix 25.8.1:
Atlas Prime’s Rumblers will maintain their Primed appearance even if another Atlas Skin is equipped on him. 
The only exception is if the Atlas Karst Skin is equipped, as it has Rumblers of its own.

patchlogs.name: Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0 + 25.8.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Atlas Prime: Update 25.8.0:
Embody the herculean strength of the mountain with Atlas Prime. This titanic warrior comes with the Tekko Prime, the Dethcube Prime Sentinel and more!
Get the newest Prime gear with Atlas Prime Access and Prime Accessories here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access
New Axi Relics for Atlas Prime, Tekko Prime, and Dethcube Prime now also drop in Rotation C of Galleon Disruption, Lua Disruption, and Jupiter Disruption.
Baro Ki'Teer to his offerings over several visits during Atlas Prime Access
Loot petrified: Atlas 
Atlas' Rumbler summons will now create a burst of rocks when summoned/destroyed.
Atlas Prime’s Tectonics rock wall now has a Primed appearance!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to use Warframe Abilities / Transference if Atlas’ Titanic Rumbler Augment Mod is activated due to bindings.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.4 + 25.7.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Further decreased the max size of Atlas’ Rumblers ever so slightly so they no longer get caught in certain doors.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Titanic Rumbler Augment making his Rumblers too big to fit through the doors. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1122613-atlas-titanic-rumbler-augment-makes-rumbler-too-large-to-go-through-doorway/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.additions:
Added Arsenal Ability videos for Atlas.
Fixed a crash when re-casting Atlas’ Rumblers.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas’ Karst shoulder piece not hiding when aiming with a weapon.
Fixed Atlas’ Karst Golems not appearing in his Abilities Arsenal screen.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.7.0 + 24.7.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Atlas’ Karst Market dioramas now display his accompanying deluxe Golems.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Atlas Tectonics
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Tectonics remaining around if you spam activate while deactivating (during the wall push animation).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Rumblers Explosion Damage stat claiming to be Impact when it's actually Blast.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some Heavy Zaws applying their innate damage multiplier to the base damage of Warframe’s with abilities that scale off their equipped melee (Atlas, Khora, etc).

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing ground-punch sounds on Atlas' Rumblers

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.9.1
patchlogs.changes:
Improved visibility when aiming with the Imugi Prime Armor equipped on bulkier Warframes (Rhino, Chroma, Atlas).
Updated theme texture icons for all Warframe Skins/Helmets for Ash, Atlas, Banshee, Chroma, Ember and Equinox.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.17.0 + 22.17.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that occured when casting Atlas’ Rumblers or when his Rumbles died.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.16.5 + 22.16.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that can occur when picking up Rubble generated by Atlas' Petrify ability.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.15.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies Petrified from Atlas’ Rumbler cast/Path of Statues Augment not dropping Rubble when killed.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.14.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas only getting 50 Rubble from Petrified enemies when it should be 75.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Atlas’ Rubble not having any physics, which resulted in Rubble floating in the air if that Petrified enemy died there.
Fixed ‘ARMOR’ not being localized in Atlas’ custom HUD.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas' Rubble sticking around if you switch your Warframe in the Simulacrum Arsenal while Rubble is on your Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the decay rate of Atlas’ Rubble by half.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Enemies petrified by Atlas’ Path of Statues Augment Mod not dropping Rubble.
Fixed a script error when casting Atlas’ Tectonics.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Made the smoke on Atlas Graxx helmet more visible, especially when in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Atlas Graxx Skin by Faven

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Hydroid’s Undertow allowing Atlas to spawn infinite Rumblers as seen here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/6svjic/my_friend_and_i_were_testing_out_hydroids_rework/

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.changes: Improved enemies for targeting Atlas' Tectonic Bulwarks so they shouldn't get stuck (at least as often).
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed being able to use Atlas' Tectonics Bulwark to prevent Defectors from bulwalking through doorways. The Bulwark wall now detects Defectors and the wall will collapse.
Fixed a case where Atlas’ Tectonic Bulwark walls can have weird targeting from enemies, causing them to either not see the wall or attack it in incorrect ways (eg. shooting it when they can melee it).

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a possible script error with Atlas’ Petrify.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Friendly Archwing markers, Atlas, Rhino, Valkyr’s custom HUD and Inaros’ resurrect HUD are now affected by the HUD scaling sliders in the Interface options.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Changed Atlas' Rumblers HUD marker from objective to Allied NPC.
Atlas' Rumbler's damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Atlas' Landslide

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Atlas Telamon Helmet by artarrwen

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas' Rumbler names showing up as a file-path.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Rota Syandana not fitting properly when using the Shikoro Atlas Helmet.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas Landslide augment being able to petrify himself if he's radiation proc'd.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Atlas Tartarus helmet not appearing in Alert cycles.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed strange Melee Weapon holster positions on Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed badge placements on Excalibur, Chroma, Mirage, Saryn and Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed weird positioning of Staff Melee weapons on Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Atlas Rumbler Conclave Augment 
Atlas becomes a Rumbler with rock armor that can absorb up to 500 damage.
Atlas’s Landslide and Rhino’s Charge now have a 0.8x energy multiplier per successive hit.
Fixed Atlas’ Landslide not functioning on enemies impaled by Nezha’s Divine Spears.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Atlas's Rumblers attacking each other in Annihilation.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Grineer Guardsmen not being able to properly attack Atlas` Tectonics rock wall.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Rumblers repeating their spawn animation when being shot at while being created.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas’ Rumblers not properly playing destruction audio FX when unsummoned early.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Rhino Charge now has a re-cast combo counter (mechanically identical to Valkyr's Ripline and Atlas' Landslide).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed invulnerability from Atlas when using Landslide in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas being able to fire weapons while punching during Landslide.
Fixed Atlas’ Tectonics rock wall being scannable.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.additions: The Atlas Tartarus Alt Helmet is now available in the Market.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas’ Tectonics being unable to go through Frost’s Snow Globe as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/541593-tectonics-boulder-can-not-go-through-snow-globe/
Fixed a crash caused by Atlas’ Tectonics interaction with continuous fire weapons as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/541795-total-game-crash-when-shooting-tectonics/
Fixed Atlas’ Petrify applying stone textures to the Corpus security cameras.
Fixed bows and quivers not properly sitting on Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.2
patchlogs.changes:
Atlas’ Landslide now has improved damage scaling based on the Mods of your Melee weapons.
Atlas’ Rumblers health is now affected by Health and Shield Mods.
Atlas’ Rumblers armor is now affected by Armor and Strength Mods.
Atlas’ Rumblers base armor has been increased to 500.
Atlas’ Landslide proc chance and crit multiplier have been increased.
Atlas’ Tectonics health is now affected by Atlas’ armor rating. Tectonics starts invulnerable and absorbs any damage for a certain period, just like Frost's Snowglobe.
Fixed Atlas’ Tectonics boulder not doing damage to enemies when cast by Clients.
Fixed Atlas’ Tectonics boulder not dragging ragdolled enemies with it while rolling.
Fixed Atlas’ Tectonics boulder not hitting ragdolled enemies once launched.
Audio FX on Atlas’ Petrify have been tweaked.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Allies can now walk through Atlas' Tectonics.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Atlas’ summoned Rumblers not dying when entering Nullifier bubbles.
Fixed an effect from Rest being frozen solid from Atlas' Petrify.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a Atlas’ Petrify having an unusual effect on the Eximus ice shield as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/539173-atlas-petrify-visual-bug-on-artic-eximus/
Fixed players being able to use weapons while spamming Atlas’ Landslide.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.3
patchlogs.changes: Atlas has had his Armor stat increased to 450.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Atlas's Tectonics toggling not always working as intended as per https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/536715-atlas-tectonics-glitch/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.additions: Tekko: These iron fists that rip through foes with each strike are Atlas’ signature weapon.
patchlogs.changes:
Titan of stone, lord of the earthly elementals.  Atlas’ powers include:
Petrify: Fossilize foes with Atlas` hardened gaze.
